addModal.title: Add Stock
addModal.addToExisting: Add quantity to existing product (with new price)
addModal.existingHint: 💡 Use this option to add new quantity with different price to existing product (e.g. buying sugar at new price)
addModal.newHint: 💡 Use this option only to add a product that didn't exist before
addModal.infoLine1: • You can add new quantity with different price than previous price
addModal.infoLine2: • Complete record of all purchases and prices will be saved
addModal.infoLine3: • You can review the record from "Stock Movements" button 📊
addModal.selectFromList: Please select a product from the list
addModal.dateHint: You can specify a past date and time for the operation
addModal.isRawMaterial: Is this product a raw material?
addModal.rawMaterialHint: Raw materials are primary materials used in preparing products (e.g. sugar, flour, milk)
addModal.noteCannotDuplicate: • Cannot add a product with the same name for one establishment
addModal.noteUseExisting: • If the product exists, use "Add quantity to existing product"
addModal.noteDifferentBranches: • Products with the same name can be added in different establishments
addModal.successMessage: This operation has also been automatically recorded in costs.

editModal.title: Edit Product
editModal.cannotEdit: Cannot edit current stock from here
editModal.useAddStock: Use "Add Stock" to add new quantity
editModal.priceNote: This is the last purchase price

deleteModal.usedInMenu: ⚠️ Warning: This product is used in the menu
deleteModal.usedInItems: Product is used in the following items:
deleteModal.cannotDelete: Cannot delete this product because it's used in the menu
deleteModal.removeFirst: Please remove it from items first or replace it with another product

deductModal.title: Deduct Stock
deductModal.adjustmentHint: 💡 Adjusts stock to specified quantity (for inventory)

movementsModal.title: Stock Movement History
movementsModal.totalValueHint: Calculated based on each batch price (FIFO)
movementsModal.noMovements: No stock movements for this product

editMovementModal.title: Edit Stock Movement
editMovementModal.inWarning1: • This is an addition movement - changing quantity will affect current stock
editMovementModal.inWarning2: • Increase quantity = increase stock | Decrease quantity = decrease stock
editMovementModal.inWarning3: • Changing price will affect FIFO calculations for subsequent movements
editMovementModal.outWarning1: • This is a deduction movement - changing quantity will affect current stock
editMovementModal.outWarning2: • Increase quantity = decrease stock more | Decrease quantity = increase stock
editMovementModal.outWarning3: • Price is automatically calculated using FIFO from oldest batches
editMovementModal.adjustmentWarning1: • This is an adjustment movement - changing quantity will set stock to new value
editMovementModal.adjustmentWarning2: • New quantity will replace current stock at this point in time

deleteMovementModal.title: Delete Stock Movement
deleteMovementModal.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this movement?
deleteMovementModal.warning: Stock will be automatically recalculated after deletion
